title: gelonium tolambitu
side_effects: Gelonium tolambitu can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing nausea, dizziness, and headaches in some individuals. In severe cases, excessive consumption can lead to liver damage, kidney problems, and even seizures. Additionally, improper use of gelonium tolambitu may cause allergic reactions, including skin irritation, hives, and respiratory issues. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant to avoid these potentially life-threatening side effects.
